LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT THROUGH THE CHULIK DECLARATION THE OBJECTIONS TO WHICH ARE OVERRULED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO FALSE REPRESENTATION AND INTENTIONAL TORT BUT OTHERWISE DENIED. DEFENDANT IS CAUTIONED TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1110(E) AND (F) AND 3.1350 (G). DEFENDANT TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-18-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. LAURA RAWSON OF THE LAW FIRM OF LEWIS, BRISBOIS & SMITH, TEL. NO. 262-8576 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION - MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT THROUGH THE CHULIK DECLARATION THE OBJECTIONS TO WHICH ARE OVERRULED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO FALSE REPRESENTATION AND INTENTIONAL TORT BUT OTHERWISE DENIED. DEFENDANT IS CAUTIONED TO COMPLY WITH C R C 3.1110(E) AND (F) AND 3.1350 (G). DEFENDANT TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =301/PJB/BD
